title: sasaella retropila
side_effects: Sasaella retropila can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. Prolonged consumption of its extracts has been linked to kidney damage, liver toxicity, and cardiovascular problems. In extreme cases, excessive use of Sasaella retropila has been reported to cause seizures, coma, and even death. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these severe side effects.
